description_long: This is a sporty red convertible car with an aggressive aerodynamic design, featuring a prominent rear spoiler and dual exhaust pipes. The car has a low, wide stance with flared wheel arches and large, red alloy wheels accented by yellow highlights along the sides. The interior is visible and includes brown leather seats and a detailed dashboard, emphasizing its open-top configuration. The front end showcases a sculpted hood with air vents and sharp, angular headlights, while the rear displays a custom license plate reading 'JOYRID'. The side profile reveals sleek, aerodynamic lines and a two-door layout, typical of high-performance sports convertibles. The overall appearance suggests a modern, high-powered vehicle designed for speed and style in urban environments.
description: A red, high-performance convertible sports car with a large rear spoiler, red alloy wheels, and visible brown leather interior. It features aggressive styling, yellow side accents, and a custom 'JOYRID' license plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sculpted hood with air vents, angular headlights, and the open convertible top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large red wheels, yellow side accent, and brown leather seats.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual exhaust pipes, rear spoiler, and 'JOYRID' license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible interior and aerodynamic body lines.
